participants: Meera Shah (VP Finance, XYZ Air Services)
raw_text:
Alice: David, Meera — thank you for signing off on the proposal. I'm confirming we've received the signed contract from XYZ Air Services for $375,000 per year, 3-year term.

David: Confirmed on our end. The board signed off yesterday. We're excited to move forward. The IT team is already preparing the environment.

Meera: We've processed the first invoice. Payment will be cleared within 30 days as per the agreed terms.

Alice: Excellent. Your customer success manager will be in touch within 48 hours to kick off onboarding. We're targeting go-live for June 1st as planned.

David: That works perfectly. We're moving 500 users across. The renewal would come up in February 2028 on a 3-year deal.

Alice: Noted. I'll make sure that's logged. Looking forward to a successful partnership.
